warnings: Several relation tables are present only in tool-derived evidence but not in the parsed table-definition block: isMember, geo_Source, mergesWith, located, locatedOn, islandIn, Located. Mappings using these tables are included with slightly reduced confidence.
Religion and EthnicGroup concept classes are induced from name values in country-share tables rather than from dedicated entity tables; this may collapse homonyms across countries.
countryBordersCountry is modeled in one direction only to stay conservative; the source data may represent symmetric borders with duplicated or non-duplicated rows.
Politics.Dependent references Country.Code, but its exact semantics are ambiguous from schema alone; no direct country-to-country dependency property was asserted.
Some generic superclass classes are inferred for ontology organization and have no direct table mappings.
omissions_or_low_confidence_areas: No inverse object properties were added.
No ontology class was created for Economy, Politics, or Population because they behave like 1:1 country extensions.
No direct mappings were created for mergesWith or located because table definitions are absent and semantics are less certain than the join evidence alone.
